options.name: <leaf_cellName>
options.description: specify leaf cells to which to add padding

options.name: <padding>
options.description: specify a factor to calculate the padding dimension on the right side

options.name: -bottom
options.description: specify a factor to calculate the padding dimension on the bottom side

options.name: -left
options.description: specify a factor to calculate the padding dimension on the left side

options.name: -right
options.description: specify a factor to calculate the padding dimension on the right side

options.name: -top
options.description: specify a factor to calculate the padding dimension on the top side
